reviews.review_description:
No idea what's supposed to be going on in the game, but it has a nice look at least.
1 issue I have so far (beyond the menus moving with my head...ATTENTION ALL VR DEVELOPERS- STOP DOING THIS USELESS FEATURE IN YOUR GAMES!!!), are the free rotation camera (I hate Snap turning) is SO godawefully slow, but not too bad given the game style/ perspective either I guess. But WHY are your hands stuck facing up/ palm forward and the pointer coming out of your palm? This is incredibly awkward..😅
Why not do like everyone else and go with index finger pointer if anything. Also, the red pointer only comes out of the left hand, not sure if that's another odd design choice or a bug, but the game is possibly made with Lefties in mind. Not sure, but not a huge issue either. 
So I'll have to play more, but already it seems like something that needs some work. I'd likely be requesting a refund if I bought it at full price in it'scurrent state ($15...), but as is I'll push on to see what the developers have cooked up, and hope they continue cooking going forward since the general gameplay premise does have promise and the look of the world and characters are charming.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your valuable opinion!
I will take it into consideration and update it.
Thank you for your continued support!
